title: Container image promote → new default used on next start
evidence: All 9 TC-024 tests passed in 1623ms: - POST /v1/admin/images/:id/promote → 200 {promoted: true, tag: 'claw-tenant:v2.0'} - v2.0 is_default=1 after promotion - v1.0 is_default=0 and deprecated_at set - IMAGE_UPDATED audit event (actor=admin, metadata.promotedTag='claw-tenant:v2.0') - STOPPED tenant created with old image_tag v1.0 - POST /start → 202 {status: 'starting'} - tenant.image_tag updated to 'claw-tenant:v2.0' synchronously on start - IMAGE_UPDATED audit event for tenant (actor=system, oldTag/newTag in metadata) - Tenant reaches ACTIVE; image_tag still v2.0 Suite: 400/401 passed (TC-015 pre-existing failure unrelated to TC-024)
